---
title: "PEPFAR Budget and Expenditure Analysis"
output: word_document
date: "2026-06-22"
author: "Vanessa Da Costa"
purpose: "verify original analysis"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r}
#1 Download Downloaded PEPFAR’s Public Partner Budgets and Expenditures

library(readr)
PEPFAR_BUDGET_EXPEND <- read_delim("~/Documents/R/PEPFAR/Public Partner Budgets and Expenditures.txt") #41,088 observations, 38 variables
```

```{r}
# 2Remove USG M&O
library (dplyr)
PEPFAR_BUDGET_EXPEND_noMO <-PEPFAR_BUDGET_EXPEND %>% 
  dplyr::filter(`Partner Name`!= "Management and Operations")  #39,235 observations, 38 variables
```

```{r}
#3 Calculate total expenditure, budget, and budget execution by year for 2023, 2024, 2025
library (tidyr)
library (gtsummary)


PEPFAR_summary <- PEPFAR_BUDGET_EXPEND_noMO %>%
filter(!`Implementation Year` %in% c(2021, 2022)) %>% 
  group_by(`Operating Unit`, `Implementation Year`) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Budget      = sum(`Total Planned Funding`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Total_Expenditure = sum(`Total Expenditure`, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
    mutate(
    Budget_Execution = (Total_Expenditure / Total_Budget) * 100,
    Budget_Execution = round(Budget_Execution, 2)            
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(contains(c("Total_Budget", "Total_Expenditure")), 
                ~ scales::dollar(., accuracy = 1)))  %>% 
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = `Implementation Year`,
    values_from = c(Total_Budget, Total_Expenditure, Budget_Execution) 
  ) 

PEPFAR_summary <- PEPFAR_summary %>%
  select(`Operating Unit`,Total_Expenditure_2023, Total_Budget_2023, Budget_Execution_2023,
         Total_Expenditure_2024, Total_Budget_2024, Budget_Execution_2024, Total_Expenditure_2025, Total_Budget_2025, Budget_Execution_2025)

PEPFAR_summary
```

```{r}
#4 Downloaded Amfar FY2025 Based Analysis Combined (overall grant status tab)

library (readxl)
PEPFAR_AWARDS<- read_excel("~/Documents/R/PEPFAR/Combined FY2025 PEPFAR Program Status.xlsx") %>%   
dplyr::mutate(
    `Mechanism Code`= case_when(
      MECHID %in% c(2) ~ "All for OU",
           MECHID %in% c(1) ~ "Redacted as the Partner is to be determined",
      TRUE ~ MECHID
    ))  

PEPFAR_AWARDS
```

```{r}
#5 Triangulated PEPFAR data (FY2025 only) with Amfar Data
  #5G Created an adjusted mechanism ID column to better match the Amfar 
 

library(tidyr)

PEPFAR_Combined <-PEPFAR_BUDGET_EXPEND_noMO %>% 
    filter(`Implementation Year` %in% c(2025)) %>% 
     dplyr::mutate(
    `amFAR_MECHID`= case_when(
      `Mechanism Code` %in% c("All for OU") ~ "2",
         `Mechanism Code` %in% c("Redacted as the Partner is to be determined") ~ "1",
      TRUE ~ `Mechanism Code`
    )) %>% 
     dplyr::mutate(
    `ISO3_updated`= case_when(
      `Operating Unit` %in% c("Caribbean Region") & ISO3=="?"  ~ "CB1",
      `Operating Unit` %in% c("Central Asia Region")  & ISO3=="?" ~ "AR1",
       `Operating Unit` %in% c("Central Asia Region")  & is.na(ISO3) ~ "AR1",
      `Operating Unit` %in% c("Central and South America Region")  & ISO3=="?" ~ "CA1",
      `Operating Unit` %in% c("West Africa Region 2")  & ISO3=="?" ~ "WA2",
       `Operating Unit` %in% c("Pacific Region")  & is.na(ISO3) ~ "PR1",
      TRUE ~ ISO3
    )) 

PEPFAR_Combined    
```

```{r}
#5E Matched adjusted mech ID in Column G to Amfar mech ID to identify status.Added a unique identifier UniqueOUAgencyMech for each row to assist with Step 6
Master_2025Data <- PEPFAR_Combined %>%  left_join(PEPFAR_AWARDS,
       by = c("ISO3_updated"="COUNTRY", "amFAR_MECHID"="MECHID")) %>% 
          dplyr::mutate(
    STATUS= case_when(
      `STATUS` %in% c(NA) ~ "Not Found",
     TRUE ~ STATUS
    ))  %>% 
 tidyr::unite(UniqueOUAgencyMech, `Operating Unit`, `Funding Agency`,`amFAR_MECHID`, sep = ".", remove = FALSE)  

Master_2025Data
```

```{r}

#6 Added a unique identifier UniqueOUAgencyMech for each row to assist with Step 6
Rolled_up_Master_2025Data <- Master_2025Data %>% 
         dplyr::mutate(
    `Type of Mechanism`= case_when(
      `amFAR_MECHID` %in% c("2") ~ "Unallocated PM",
         `amFAR_MECHID` %in% c("1") ~ "TBD",
      TRUE ~ amFAR_MECHID)) %>% 
    group_by(UniqueOUAgencyMech, `Type of Mechanism`, `Funding Agency`, `STATUS`) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Expenditure = sum(`Total Expenditure`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Total_Budget      = sum(`Total Planned Funding`, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )  %>% 
    
#6A Added columns G & H to indicate whether any budget or any expenditure was reported
mutate(
  Budget    = if_else(Total_Budget != 0 & !is.na(Total_Budget), "Yes", "No"),
  Expenditure = if_else(Total_Expenditure != 0 & !is.na(Total_Expenditure), "Yes", "No")
)

Rolled_up_Master_2025Data

```

```{r}

#7 Analyzed reporting / non-reporting patterns

#REPORTING TABLE 1
IM_analysis <- Rolled_up_Master_2025Data %>%
 filter(!`Type of Mechanism` %in% c("Unallocated PM", "TBD")) %>%
  summarise(
    `Number of IMs with Budget`                          = sum(Budget == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    `Number of IMs Reporting Expenditures`               = sum(Expenditure == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    `Number of IMs with Budget but No Expenditures`      = sum(Budget == "Yes" & Expenditure == "No", na.rm = TRUE),
    `Number of IMs with Budget and Expenditures`         = sum(Budget == "Yes" & Expenditure == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    `Number of IMs with No Budget but Expenditures`      = sum(Budget == "No" & Expenditure == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "Metric",
    values_to = "Count"
  )


IM_analysis

#REPORTING TABLE 2

no_budget_analysis <- Rolled_up_Master_2025Data %>%
   filter(!`Type of Mechanism` %in% c("Unallocated PM", "TBD")) %>%
  filter(Budget == "Yes" & Expenditure == "No", na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  summarise(
    `Confirmed Terminated`    = sum(`STATUS` == "Terminated", na.rm = TRUE),
    `Unknown or Not in AMFAR Database` = sum(`STATUS` %in% c("Unknown", "Not Found"), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Active` = sum(`STATUS` == "Active", na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "Status Category",
    values_to = "Count"
  )

no_budget_analysis

#REPORTING TABLE 3

agency_analysis <- Rolled_up_Master_2025Data %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
    `Funding Agency`= case_when(
      `Funding Agency` %in% c("HHS/CDC") ~ "CDC",
        `Funding Agency` %in% c("USAID") ~ "USAID",
      TRUE ~ "Other")) %>% 
    filter(!`Type of Mechanism` %in% c("Unallocated PM", "TBD")) %>%
  filter(Budget == "Yes") %>%
  group_by(`Funding Agency`) %>%
  summarise(
    `Total IMs with Budget`          = n(),
    `Reporting Expenditures`         = sum(Expenditure == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    `Not Reporting Expenditures`     = sum(Expenditure == "No", na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Reporting Rate` = round((`Reporting Expenditures` / `Total IMs with Budget`) * 100, 1),
    `Reporting Rate` = paste0(`Reporting Rate`, "%")
  ) %>%
  bind_rows(
    summarise(.,
      Agency                         = "Total",
      `Total IMs with Budget`        = sum(`Total IMs with Budget`),
      `Reporting Expenditures`       = sum(`Reporting Expenditures`),
      `Not Reporting Expenditures`   = sum(`Not Reporting Expenditures`),
      `Reporting Rate`               = paste0(round(sum(`Reporting Expenditures`) / sum(`Total IMs with Budget`) * 100, 1), "%")
    )
  )
agency_analysis

#REPORTING TABLE 4

STATUS_analysis <- Rolled_up_Master_2025Data %>%
    filter(!`Type of Mechanism` %in% c("Unallocated PM", "TBD")) %>%
  filter(Budget == "Yes") %>%
  group_by(`STATUS`) %>%
  summarise(
    `Total IMs with Budget`          = n(),
    `Reporting Expenditures`         = sum(Expenditure == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    `Not Reporting Expenditures`     = sum(Expenditure == "No", na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Reporting Rate` = round((`Reporting Expenditures` / `Total IMs with Budget`) * 100, 1),
    `Reporting Rate` = paste0(`Reporting Rate`, "%")
  ) %>%
  bind_rows(
    summarise(.,
      STATUS                         = "Total",
      `Total IMs with Budget`        = sum(`Total IMs with Budget`),
      `Reporting Expenditures`       = sum(`Reporting Expenditures`),
      `Not Reporting Expenditures`   = sum(`Not Reporting Expenditures`),
      `Reporting Rate`               = paste0(round(sum(`Reporting Expenditures`) / sum(`Total IMs with Budget`) * 100, 1), "%")
    )
  )
STATUS_analysis
```

```{r}

#8 Created a list of the 512 mechanisms that were active, had a FY2025 budget, and reported FY2025 expenditures


activemechs_analysis <- Rolled_up_Master_2025Data %>%
   filter(!`Type of Mechanism` %in% c("Unallocated PM", "TBD")) %>%
  filter(STATUS== "Active" & Budget == "Yes" & Expenditure == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE) %>% 
    dplyr::mutate(Program_shifts = "Unaffected")  


activemechs_analysis

```

```{r}

#9 Analyzed total expenditures and budgets by sub-program for the 512, and the share of total sub-program budget that the 512 represent

#TABLE 1 =(All Mechs)
Subprogram_allmechs_analysis<- Master_2025Data %>% 
group_by(`Sub Program`) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Expenditure = sum(`Total Expenditure`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Total_Budget      = sum(`Total Planned Funding`, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )  %>% 
        mutate(
    Budget_Execution = (Total_Expenditure / Total_Budget) * 100,
    Budget_Execution = round(Budget_Execution, 2)            
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(contains(c("Total_Budget", "Total_Expenditure")), 
                ~ scales::dollar(., accuracy = 1)))  

Subprogram_allmechs_analysis

#TABLE 2 =(512 Only)
Master_2025Data_subgroup <- Master_2025Data %>% 
group_by(`UniqueOUAgencyMech`, `Sub Program`)


Subprogram_512mechs_analysis <- Master_2025Data_subgroup %>% inner_join(activemechs_analysis,
       by = c("UniqueOUAgencyMech")) %>% 
    group_by(`Sub Program`) %>% 
  summarise(
    Total_Expenditure = sum(`Total Expenditure`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Total_Budget      = sum(`Total Planned Funding`, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )  %>% 
        mutate(
    Budget_Execution = (Total_Expenditure / Total_Budget) * 100,
    Budget_Execution = round(Budget_Execution, 2)            
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(contains(c("Total_Budget", "Total_Expenditure")), 
                ~ scales::dollar(., accuracy = 1))) 
    

Subprogram_512mechs_analysis


```
